name: stash
description: Stash and show windows in named groups using special workspaces.

commands.name: stash
commands.short_description: Toggle stashing the focused window (default stash: "default").
commands.full_description:
[name] Toggle stashing the focused window (default stash: "default").

Args:
    name: The stash group name

commands.name: stash_toggle
commands.short_description: Show or hide stash "name" as floating windows on the active workspace (default: "default").
commands.full_description:
[name] Show or hide stash "name" as floating windows on the active workspace (default: "default").

When showing, windows are moved from the hidden stash workspace to the
active workspace and made floating.  When hiding, they are moved back.

Args:
    name: The stash group name

config.name: style
config.description: Window rules to apply to shown stash windows
